0.content:
# 🛰️ API Monitor — Squad 14
### Porto Digital · Universidade Extreme

> Dashboard de monitoramento de APIs públicas com integração Dynatrace RUM.
> Desenvolvido pelo Squad 14 como projeto prático de observabilidade.

2.title: Active users & sessions
2.query:
timeseries {
    active_users.ts = countDistinct(dt.frontend.user.active.estimated_count),
    active_users.value = countDistinct(dt.frontend.user.active.estimated_count, scalar: true),
    active_sessions.ts = countDistinct(dt.frontend.session.active.estimated_count),
    active_sessions.value = countDistinct(dt.frontend.session.active.estimated_count, scalar: true)
},
union: TRUE,
filter: dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-4E0AAF618AE6162A" and (dt.rum.user_type != "synthetic" and isNotNull(dt.rum.user_type))

3.title: Error rate
3.query:
timeseries {
    timeseries = sum(dt.frontend.error.count, rate: 1min),
    rate = sum(dt.frontend.error.count, rate: 1min, scalar: true),
    total = sum(dt.frontend.error.count, scalar: true)
},
by: { error.type },
union: TRUE,
filter: dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-4E0AAF618AE6162A" and (dt.rum.user_type != "synthetic" and isNotNull(dt.rum.user_type))
| sort total desc

4.title: Views
4.query:
fetch user.events, samplingRatio: 1, scanLimitGBytes: 500
| filterOut dt.rum.user_type == "synthetic" OR isNull(dt.rum.user_type)
| filter characteristics.has_view_summary or characteristics.has_w3c_navigation_timings
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-4E0AAF618AE6162A"
| filter isNotNull(view.name)
| fieldsAdd error.count = error.csp_violation_count + error.exception_count + error.http_4xx_count + error.http_5xx_count + error.http_other_count
| summarize {
    visit.count = countIf(characteristics.has_w3c_navigation_timings),
    user.count = countDistinct(dt.rum.instance.id),
    session.count = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    foreground_time.avg = avg(view.foreground_time),
    error.count = sum(error.count),
    lcp = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75),
    fid = percentile(web_vitals.first_input_delay, 75),
    cls = percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75),
    inp = percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75),
    ttfb = percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75),
    loadEventEnd = percentile(performance.load_event_end, 75),
    domInteractive = percentile(performance.dom_interactive, 75)
  }, by: { view.name }
| fieldsAdd visit.per_minute = visit.count / (toDuration(timeframe(from: now()-2h, to: now())) / duration(1, "min")), errors.per_minute = error.count / (toDuration(timeframe(from: now()-2h, to: now())) / duration(1, "min"))
| sort visit.per_minute desc

5.query:
fetch user.events, samplingRatio: 1, scanLimitGBytes: 500
| filterOut dt.rum.user_type == "synthetic" OR isNull(dt.rum.user_type)
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-4E0AAF618AE6162A"
| filter isNotNull(view.name)

| fieldsAdd error.count = error.csp_violation_count + error.exception_count + error.http_4xx_count + error.http_5xx_count + error.http_other_count

// 2. Filter out any event/view that didn't experience an error
| filter error.count > 0

// 3. Summarize metrics strictly around error volume and user impact
| summarize {
    total_errors = sum(error.count),
    impacted_users = countDistinct(dt.rum.instance.id),
    impacted_sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    csp_errors = sum(error.csp_violation_count),
    exception_errors = sum(error.exception_count),
    http_4xx_errors = sum(error.http_4xx_count),
    http_5xx_errors = sum(error.http_5xx_count)
  }, by: { view.name }

| fieldsAdd errors.per_minute = total_errors / (toDuration(timeframe(from: now()-2h, to: now())) / duration(1, "min"))
| sort total_errors desc
